creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks! 

(In reply to Minsoo Choo from comment #2)

Re: the oversight, the URL of the PR was in the main URL field, and in comment 0. 

I'll learn more about Phabricator and the FreeBSD Project's use of it. (I've been a user for a few months, but have no idea how to begin a review. I'm now at <https://wiki.freebsd.org/Phabricator>, redirected from <https://wiki.freebsd.org/CodeReview>.)
